items.title: [Steam论坛] I am a new player, need advice on what to do
items.summary:
I started playing 2 months ago i think but im kinda always slow on start so rn im only lvl 43 and on 5th chapter. i read imfamous newbie guide so i have general understanding of a game but i still lack of expirience. 

Rn im kinda confused with what should be my pulling plan and what team i should build.
I understand that u cant play only 1 team but i just dont like any dps chars that i have.

For u to undestand this is what i have rn:
limited chars: Thais e1, Saya e3+1, Corposant, GHelot, Tulu
